title: Introducing SimpleSwap
excerpt: Particl Partner for Powering In-App Swaps
custom_excerpt: Particl Partner for Powering In-App Swaps

plaintext:
Particl Partner for Powering In-App Swaps
The upcoming Particl V3 massive update
[https://particl.news/stepping-things-up-again-with-particl-desktop-3-0-383646386813] 
is going to introduce a slew of improvements, new features, and functionalities
to the Particl ecosystem as well as significantly improve its performance.

One of the components that’s getting a big makeover is the bot manager and the
in-app swap engine, which it powers, that allows you to swap a variety of coins
for PART, straight from the wallet. Check out the article linked below for an
in-depth breakdown of all the improvements to the in-app swap engine that are
coming with the Particl V3 release.

New Coins and Swap Engine Improvements Coming to Particl V3
[https://particl.news/new-coins-and-swap-engine-improvements-coming-to-particl-v3-e1ece36edda7]
DAI, XMR, NIX, USDt, and USDC Going Live Soon on Particl V3particl.news
[https://particl.news/new-coins-and-swap-engine-improvements-coming-to-particl-v3-e1ece36edda7]

Powered by Third-Parties
Although Particl has been researching and experimenting with atomic swaps,
especially as of late, the current swap module works by partnering up with
third-party exchanges who provide the swap functionality to the Particl Desktop
user.

We’d like you today to meet SimpleSwap, a long-time swap partner of Particl, and
get to know them a bit better!


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Meet SimpleSwap
> https://www.simpleswap.io/
SimpleSwap | Cryptocurrency Exchange | Easy way to swap BTC to ETH, XRP, LTC,
EOS, XLM [https://www.simpleswap.io/]
SimpleSwap is a cryptocurrency exchange that allows to swap BTC and altcoins in
an easy way. SimpleSwap supports 300+…www.simpleswap.io
[https://www.simpleswap.io/]

SimpleSwap is a user-friendly and reliable instant swap exchange that supports
more than 300 cryptocurrencies. Their platform is free from sign-up, meaning
that you don’t need to store any funds on the exchange, and makes swapping
cryptocurrencies as simple, safe, and comfortable as a daily shopping trip. You
can use SimpleSwap by going to their website or by downloading their mobile
application which is available on iOS [https://apple.co/3mEP7mT] and Android
[https://bit.ly/2ZWsRLg]

SimpleSwap provides two types of exchange: floating and fixed rate.

Floating rate: A classic cryptocurrency exchange type where the approximate
receiving amount is shown at the time of the exchange creation. At the end of a
swap, you can get either more or fewer coins than expected at the beginning of
the floating rate exchange due to the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency
market. There are no restriction for floating rate exchanges: you can make swaps
for any amount of cryptocurrencies without strong limits of time for sending the
deposit.

Fixed rate: Allows you to receive exactly the estimated amount. The fixed rate
exchange is independent of market volatility. This means that changes in the
coins rates do not affect the fixed rate exchange. When you create the fixed
rate exchange you have 20 minutes to send SimpleSwap a deposit.

Simple Swap Limited, a limited liability company registered in the UK, promises
the following benefits.

Wide range of coins
SimpleSwap has more than 300 cryptocurrencies available for swapping on their
exchange, with the count constantly going up.

24/7 support
Their friendly and skilled support team will help you out when you need it. Just
send them an email and make sure to save your SimpleSwap transaction IDs for
faster troubleshooting.

Reliable service
SimpleSwap is a reliable exchange without any mass system failure. 99% of the
time SimpleSwap is ready to go and help you swap coins.

User-friendly interface
SimpleSwap makes the process of cryptocurrency exchange easy and convenient for
everyone. No need for complicated processes to be involved.

Mobile App
SimpleSwap has a mobile app that is available for two platforms: iOS
[https://apple.co/3mEP7mT] and Android [https://bit.ly/2ZWsRLg]. There you can
use the address book for your regular addresses, automatically get a status of
your exchange, and view the history of all swaps.

 * Check out their official website and exchange [https://simpleswap.io/]
 * Learn more about their terms and conditions [https://simpleswap.io/terms]
 * Learn more about the privacy policies [https://simpleswap.io/privacy]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Swap Using SimpleSwap on Particl Desktop Today!
Although more coins will become available on the day of Particl V3’s release, it
is still possible, to this day, to swap Bitcoin for PART straight from the
Particl Desktop client using SimpleSwap. All you need to do is to first activate
the SimpleSwap Exchange bot from the Bot Management page in Particl Desktop and
then request a swap from the Exchange page.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Is there any coin you’d like to see added on Particl? Then let the Particl team
know by joining the Discord server [https://discord.me/particl] or Telegram
channel [https://t.me/particlproject]! Or perhaps you are involved directly with
a cryptocurrency project? Then apply for listing directly with the application
form available on the Particl website
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeDtbFt1yp4Vhxf-5aPuL6QKCksc7oMlIlCvYlf8T9r6J-dgQ/viewform]
!


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
html:
Particl Partner for Powering In-App Swaps

The upcoming Particl V3 massive update is going to introduce a slew of improvements, new features, and functionalities to the Particl ecosystem as well as significantly improve its performance.

One of the components that’s getting a big makeover is the bot manager and the in-app swap engine, which it powers, that allows you to swap a variety of coins for PART, straight from the wallet. Check out the article linked below for an in-depth breakdown of all the improvements to the in-app swap engine that are coming with the Particl V3 release.

New Coins and Swap Engine Improvements Coming to Particl V3
DAI, XMR, NIX, USDt, and USDC Going Live Soon on Particl V3particl.news

Powered by Third-Parties

Although Particl has been researching and experimenting with atomic swaps, especially as of late, the current swap module works by partnering up with third-party exchanges who provide the swap functionality to the Particl Desktop user.

We’d like you today to meet SimpleSwap, a long-time swap partner of Particl, and get to know them a bit better!

Meet SimpleSwap

https://www.simpleswap.io/

SimpleSwap | Cryptocurrency Exchange | Easy way to swap BTC to ETH, XRP, LTC, EOS, XLM
SimpleSwap is a cryptocurrency exchange that allows to swap BTC and altcoins in an easy way. SimpleSwap supports 300+…www.simpleswap.io

SimpleSwap is a user-friendly and reliable instant swap exchange that supports more than 300 cryptocurrencies. Their platform is free from sign-up, meaning that you don’t need to store any funds on the exchange, and makes swapping cryptocurrencies as simple, safe, and comfortable as a daily shopping trip. You can use SimpleSwap by going to their website or by downloading their mobile application which is available on iOS and Android

SimpleSwap provides two types of exchange: floating and fixed rate.

Floating rate: A classic cryptocurrency exchange type where the approximate receiving amount is shown at the time of the exchange creation. At the end of a swap, you can get either more or fewer coins than expected at the beginning of the floating rate exchange due to the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market. There are no restriction for floating rate exchanges: you can make swaps for any amount of cryptocurrencies without strong limits of time for sending the deposit.

Fixed rate: Allows you to receive exactly the estimated amount. The fixed rate exchange is independent of market volatility. This means that changes in the coins rates do not affect the fixed rate exchange. When you create the fixed rate exchange you have 20 minutes to send SimpleSwap a deposit.

Simple Swap Limited, a limited liability company registered in the UK, promises the following benefits.

Wide range of coins

SimpleSwap has more than 300 cryptocurrencies available for swapping on their exchange, with the count constantly going up.

24/7 support

Their friendly and skilled support team will help you out when you need it. Just send them an email and make sure to save your SimpleSwap transaction IDs for faster troubleshooting.

Reliable service

SimpleSwap is a reliable exchange without any mass system failure. 99% of the time SimpleSwap is ready to go and help you swap coins.

User-friendly interface

SimpleSwap makes the process of cryptocurrency exchange easy and convenient for everyone. No need for complicated processes to be involved.

Mobile App

SimpleSwap has a mobile app that is available for two platforms: iOS and Android. There you can use the address book for your regular addresses, automatically get a status of your exchange, and view the history of all swaps.

  • Check out their official website and exchange
  • Learn more about their terms and conditions
  • Learn more about the privacy policies

Swap Using SimpleSwap on Particl Desktop Today!

Although more coins will become available on the day of Particl V3’s release, it is still possible, to this day, to swap Bitcoin for PART straight from the Particl Desktop client using SimpleSwap. All you need to do is to first activate the SimpleSwap Exchange bot from the Bot Management page in Particl Desktop and then request a swap from the Exchange page.

Is there any coin you’d like to see added on Particl? Then let the Particl team know by joining the Discord server or Telegram channel! Or perhaps you are involved directly with a cryptocurrency project? Then apply for listing directly with the application form available on the Particl website!

Powered by Third-Parties

We’d like you today to meet SimpleSwap, a long-time swap partner of Particl, and get to know them a bit better!

Meet SimpleSwap

https://www.simpleswap.io/

SimpleSwap | Cryptocurrency Exchange | Easy way to swap BTC to ETH, XRP, LTC, EOS, XLM
SimpleSwap is a cryptocurrency exchange that allows to swap BTC and altcoins in an easy way. SimpleSwap supports 300+…www.simpleswap.io

Simple Swap Limited, a limited liability company registered in the UK, promises the following benefits.

SimpleSwap has more than 300 cryptocurrencies available for swapping on their exchange, with the count constantly going up.

24/7 support

Their friendly and skilled support team will help you out when you need it. Just send them an email and make sure to save your SimpleSwap transaction IDs for faster troubleshooting.

Reliable service

SimpleSwap is a reliable exchange without any mass system failure. 99% of the time SimpleSwap is ready to go and help you swap coins.

User-friendly interface

SimpleSwap makes the process of cryptocurrency exchange easy and convenient for everyone. No need for complicated processes to be involved.

Mobile App

SimpleSwap has a mobile app that is available for two platforms: iOS and Android. There you can use the address book for your regular addresses, automatically get a status of your exchange, and view the history of all swaps.

  • Check out their official website and exchange
  • Learn more about their terms and conditions
  • Learn more about the privacy policies

Swap Using SimpleSwap on Particl Desktop Today!

Although more coins will become available on the day of Particl V3’s release, it is still possible, to this day, to swap Bitcoin for PART straight from the Particl Desktop client using SimpleSwap. All you need to do is to first activate the SimpleSwap Exchange bot from the Bot Management page in Particl Desktop and then request a swap from the Exchange page.

Is there any coin you’d like to see added on Particl? Then let the Particl team know by joining the Discord server or Telegram channel! Or perhaps you are involved directly with a cryptocurrency project? Then apply for listing directly with the application form available on the Particl website!
